knownIssues.title: P0 fixes shipped: dead 'reference' source removed, policy fingerprinted into cache key, sandbox precision math corrected
Centralize hardcoded scoring thresholds (READY_THRESHOLD, suppression deltas, trust adjustments) into policy.scoring
Split src/retrieval/service.ts (1787 lines) into suppression / continuation / fingerprint / deep-context / review-targets / feedback-pipeline modules
Split src/retrieval/context-pack.ts (947 lines) into pack-assembly / pack-evidence / pack-brief modules
Split src/retrieval/classifier.ts (686 lines) into classifier / classifier-signals / classifier-taxonomy modules
Sandbox MRR 0.49 — add hard-signal tie-break in fuseCandidates
hardSignalVectorPenalty should only apply when ≥2 hard signals are present (single-symbol prompts lose recall)
Memory + workflow itemTypes are massively over-retrieved (3.8% / 5.5% precision in sandbox). USEFULNESS_CAPS masks this in packs; investigate raw retrieval bloat.

keyMcpTools.name: tuberosa_start_session
keyMcpTools.purpose: Open a session and get the initial context pack

keyMcpTools.name: tuberosa_search_context
keyMcpTools.purpose: Search context without opening a session

keyMcpTools.name: tuberosa_record_context_decision
keyMcpTools.purpose: Tell Tuberosa whether the pack was useful

keyMcpTools.name: tuberosa_finish_session
keyMcpTools.purpose: Close the session; may auto-create a reflection memory
